action.query: best facial spas in Houston TX 2026

content.text:
Based on a recent web search (as of April 2026), here are some of the top-rated facial spas in and around Houston, TX. I've focused on highly reviewed options from sources like Yelp, local magazines, and spa websites, emphasizing those known for facials, skin care, and rejuvenating treatments. Ratings and popularity can vary, so I recommend checking current availability, reviews, and booking directly. I'll list a few standout ones with key details:

- **milk + honey | River Oaks**: A highly rated day spa offering a range of facials, including hydrating and anti-aging treatments, with a 4.4-star average on Yelp from over 700 reviews. It's praised for its relaxing atmosphere and skilled estheticians.[[1]](https://m.yelp.com/search?find_desc=Best+Facial&find_loc=Houston%2C+TX) Located in the River Oaks area.

- **Bare Necessities - Upper Kirby**: This spot earns a stellar 4.8-star rating on Yelp (nearly 500 reviews) for customized facials, waxing, and skin care services. It's a go-to for those seeking personalized, results-driven treatments in a boutique setting.[[1]](https://m.yelp.com/search?find_desc=Best+Facial&find_loc=Houston%2C+TX)

- **Sanctuary Spa**: Houston's first day spa (established in 1984), known for award-winning facials and advanced skin care like hydrotherapy and specialized treatments. It's a classic choice for comprehensive wellness.[[2]](https://www.besanctuary.com/)

- **Josephine's Day Spa & Salon**: Specializes in luxury facials such as Hydrafacials, with a focus on radiant, rejuvenated skin. It's highlighted for its high-end spa experience in Houston.[[3]](https://josephinesdayspa.com/spa-services/facials)

- **Esencia Beauty & Wellness Spa**: Often recommended as one of the best med spas for facials in Houston, offering aesthetic treatments like chemical peels and advanced skin care. It's noted for its variety and effectiveness.[[4]](https://www.chron.com/best/map/best-med-spas-houston)

Other strong contenders include Face Foundrie (modern, focused facials)[[5]](https://facefoundrie.com/location/houston), Amazing Face Skin Spa (personalized services)[[6]](https://www.amazingfaceskincare.net/), and The Post Oak Hotel Spa (featuring innovative "Biohacking" facials)[[7]](https://www.thepostoakhotel.com/wellness/spa). For more options, Houstonia Magazine highlights spots like Mokara Spa and Trellis Spa at the Houstonian as leaders in the wellness scene.[[8]](https://www.houstoniamag.com/health-and-wellness/best-massage-facial-day-spas-houston)

If you're looking for something specific (e.g., budget-friendly, luxury, or targeted treatments like acne facials), let me know for more tailored suggestions!
